title: Citations, Freshness, Uncertainty, Accessibility, and Feedback · Language Clinic: Rag Accessible Evidence Inspection
summary: An assistant appends three source links at the bottom, hides relevance behind color, opens inaccessible PDF pages, and reports confident text without freshness or conflict state. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the accessible evidence inspection increment in accessible evidence-first answer interface. Learne…
objectives: Make answers, citations, expandable excerpts, tables, confidence limits, loading, errors, and feedback keyboard and screen-reader operable.
Expose title, authority, effective date, version, retrieval time, supersession, conflict, and stale-state evidence without overwhelming the answer.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: rag-accessible-evidence-inspection — Make answers, citations, expandable excerpts, tables, confidence limits, loading, errors, and feedback keyboard and screen-reader operable.
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-citations-user-experience-3
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-citations-user-experience-3.
# Case 5798: a multimodal maintenance-manual release.
# Operating constraint: retain corpus, document, chunk, model, index, prompt, query, and evaluation version identity.
# Changed case: move the only supporting passage to the middle of the context and rerun the position slice.
def worked_rag_citations_user_experience_3(claims: int = 5, claim_links: int = 5, source_links: int = 4, stale_sources: int = 0, keyboard_reachable: bool = True, status_announced: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "corpusworked3",
        "query3dekrow",
        "tenant5798",
        "indexworked35798",
        "prompt3dekrow5798",
        "evaluation5798worked3",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if claims < 0 or claim_links < 0 or source_links < 0:
        return False, 0, "citation-count"
    if claim_links < claims:
        return False, claim_links, "unsupported-claim"
    if stale_sources > 0:
        return False, stale_sources, "freshness-warning"
    if not keyboard_reachable or not status_announced:
        return False, source_links, "accessible-evidence"
    assert claim_links >= claims
    return True, source_links, "inspectable-citations"

        "corpus1eyvnw",
        "querywnvye1",
        "tenant5031",
        "index1eyvnw5031",

    assert claim_links >= claims
